claim.statement: On creatorbench-v1.4, covering 1392 private held-out workflow instances from 50 creator-disjoint sources across 6 workflows, NodeVideo routed 49.4% to human review and safely abstained in 50.6%. No automatic or assisted usability claim is made because only 0/1392 results have human review. Editing-quality silent-failure incidence remains unverified.
limitations: No result is classified usable until a rendered artifact is blindly reviewed by a human.
This baseline measures request ingestion, rights validation, route eligibility, and honest non-success states—not editing quality.
Editing-quality silent-failure incidence is unverified: 0/1392 private held-out results have human review.
Official SRT timing is segment-level; word timing is uniformly interpolated inside each segment.
Intentional-pause false positives and audible join clicks remain unverified pending blinded human review.
Rendered candidates are not classified usable without human review.
Non-redistributable source and output media remain in the evaluator vault.

metrics.exportReopenScope: public deterministic center-crop render pilot; not private-heldout editing quality

missingDataTreatment: Only workflow-admissible sources enter a denominator. Unevaluated editing quality remains review_required, safely_abstained, or unsupported; it is never counted as usable.

limitations: This is a deterministic center-crop baseline for one workflow, not a subject-aware reframe claim.
The public review queue is blind to machine findings until a judgment is recorded.
No pilot result is counted as usable before human review.

reviewCases.request: Generate 16:9, 9:16, and 1:1 reframes while preserving the intended subject and action context. Target leaves and re-enters after occlusion; retain identity or request assistance. Return reviewable 16:9, 9:16, and 1:1 variants from the same source lineage.
